Class VirtualServer

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am22.controller.client.VirtualServer
public class VirtualServer extends Object
Local proxy of the server on the client side (the "Virtual Server" of the distributed-MVC schema).

The view calls methods on this proxy as if it were the server; the proxy forwards requests over the network, automatically attaching the local nickname and matchId. The matchId is set after the server confirms create/join via bindMatch(String, String), called from the update handler when it sees a MatchJoinedMessage.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    abandonRecoveredMatch(String matchId)
    Tells the server to tear down a suspended match the player chose not to resume.
    void

    Joins the lobby of an existing match.

    bindMatch(String matchId, String nickname)
    Called by the update handler when a MatchJoinedMessage arrives.
    void
    chooseTotem(String color)
    Chooses a totem colour during the pre-game selection phase.
    void
    clearMatchBinding()
    Clears the local match/nickname binding WITHOUT notifying the server: used when the server tells us the match is gone (MatchClosedMessage), so the client can return to the "matches list" state and reuse the same connection for further list/create/join.
    void
    createMatch(String hostNickname, int expectedPlayers)
    Creates a new match, registering the local player as host.
    void
    disconnect()
    Notifies the server that the local player is leaving the running match.

  • Constructor Details

    • VirtualServer

      public VirtualServer(ServerConnection serverConnection)
      Parameters:
      serverConnection - the transport used to reach the server

  • Method Details

    • getNickname

      public String getNickname()
      Returns:
      the local nickname, or null if not set yet

    • getMatchId

      public String getMatchId()
      Returns:
      the bound matchId, or null if not in a match

    • hasJoinedLobby

      public boolean hasJoinedLobby()
      Returns:
      whether both nickname and matchId are bound (the player is in a lobby/match)

    • listMatches

      public void listMatches()
      Requests the list of open matches from the server.

    • createMatch

      public void createMatch(String hostNickname, int expectedPlayers)
      Creates a new match, registering the local player as host.
      Parameters:
      hostNickname - the host's nickname
      expectedPlayers - the number of players the match should have

    • addPlayerToLobby

      public void addPlayerToLobby(String matchId, String nickname)
      Joins the lobby of an existing match.
      Parameters:
      matchId - id of the match to join
      nickname - the local player's nickname

    • bindMatch

      public void bindMatch(String matchId, String nickname)
      Called by the update handler when a MatchJoinedMessage arrives.
      Parameters:
      matchId - the confirmed match id
      nickname - the confirmed nickname

    • setExpectedPlayers

      public void setExpectedPlayers(int expectedPlayers)
      Asks the host's server to change the expected player count.
      Parameters:
      expectedPlayers - the new expected player count

    • removePlayerFromLobby

      public void removePlayerFromLobby()
      Leaves the current lobby and clears the local binding.

    • chooseTotem

      public void chooseTotem(String color)
      Chooses a totem colour during the pre-game selection phase.
      Parameters:
      color - the desired totem colour

    • placeTotem

      public void placeTotem(char offerLetter)
      Places the local player's totem on an offer tile.
      Parameters:
      offerLetter - the chosen tile's letter

    • pickCards

      public void pickCards(List<String> selectedCardIds)
      Picks cards for the current action.
      Parameters:
      selectedCardIds - ids of the chosen cards (null is treated as empty)

    • pickBonusCard

      public void pickBonusCard(String bonusCardId)
      Picks the end-of-round bonus card.
      Parameters:
      bonusCardId - id of the chosen bonus card

    • clearMatchBinding

      public void clearMatchBinding()
      Clears the local match/nickname binding WITHOUT notifying the server: used when the server tells us the match is gone (MatchClosedMessage), so the client can return to the "matches list" state and reuse the same connection for further list/create/join.

    • reconnect

      public void reconnect(String matchId, String nickname)
      Rejoins a match that survived a server crash. Unlike a normal join the matchId is already known by the client (it was kept across the drop): both nickname and matchId are bound locally right away so any move sent before the server's confirmation still routes to the right match.
      Parameters:
      matchId - id of the suspended match to resume
      nickname - the local player's nickname

    • disconnect

      public void disconnect()
      Notifies the server that the local player is leaving the running match.

    • abandonRecoveredMatch

      public void abandonRecoveredMatch(String matchId)
      Tells the server to tear down a suspended match the player chose not to resume. No local binding is required (the client never reconnected): the matchId is the one kept across the crash and is passed in explicitly.
      Parameters:
      matchId - id of the suspended match to abandon
